title: Ohio Notary Business Roadmap

phases.label: Phase 1 — Foundation
steps: Set up business basics: name, phone/email, scheduling, intake form, invoice template.
Define service area: Columbus, Franklin County, nearby suburbs.
Start with low-risk documents: acknowledgments, jurats, affidavits, school/employment forms.

phases.label: Phase 2 — Local Mobile Launch
steps: Set travel zones and travel fees.
Offer same-day, evening, and weekend service.
Create public presence: Google Business Profile, simple website, booking form.
Track appointments, mileage, revenue, and most common requests.
primaryObjective: Learn your most profitable appointment types

phases.label: Phase 3 — Specialty Niche Expansion
phases.goal: Increase ticket size and become more in-demand.
steps: Build referral channels with attorneys, care facilities, funeral/elder-service contacts, and title-related contacts.

phases.label: Phase 4 — Digital Scale
phases.goal: Reduce time lost to travel and expand capacity.
steps: Build online workflow: intake, ID prep, session scheduling, document upload, tech check.
Offer same-day RON, evening RON, and out-of-area Ohio-based service.
bestClients: Signers outside your immediate local radius

phases.label: Phase 5 — Premium Services
steps: Build relationships with title companies, escrow professionals, and real estate attorneys.
Upgrade equipment: printer, scanner, secure document workflow.
Add professional profiles and direct outreach.

phases.label: Phase 6 — Recurring Business Accounts
steps: Target B2B accounts: law firms, title companies, healthcare facilities, HR departments, property managers.
Create business packages: on-call support, scheduled office blocks, overflow support, repeat-client RON support.
primaryObjective: Build a true business instead of just side appointments

bestOrder: Use your current job as your training ground.
Launch mobile notary service in Columbus.

revenueHierarchy.label: General mobile notary
revenueHierarchy.bestFor: Fast local launch and cash flow.

revenueHierarchy.label: Same-day / after-hours mobile
revenueHierarchy.bestFor: Convenience pricing and higher-margin local work.

avenueBreakdown.title: Avenue 2: Mobile notary work
avenueBreakdown.summary: Money comes from convenience, travel, urgency, and scheduling.

avenueBreakdown.title: Avenue 3: Remote online notary work
avenueBreakdown.summary: Digital convenience with better scalability and less dead time.

avenueBreakdown.title: Avenue 4: Specialty niche notary work
avenueBreakdown.summary: Hospitals, nursing homes, jail visits, title work, estate-planning support.

avenueBreakdown.title: Avenue 5: High-ticket notary-adjacent work
avenueBreakdown.summary: Loan signings and recurring B2B accounts.

avenuesMap.title: 3. Client / Market Avenues
items: General public — affidavits, school forms, lease forms, employment forms, parental/travel forms
Legal / law office clients — affidavits, declarations, litigation support docs, execution support
Estate planning clients — powers of attorney, trust docs, healthcare directives, related affidavits
Real estate / loan clients — seller packages, refinance packages, HELOC docs, title-related docs
Auto / title clients — vehicle titles, transfer paperwork, sale-related notarizations
Medical / elder-care clients — hospital, hospice, nursing-home, urgent bedside notarizations
Jail / detention clients — family documents, POAs, sworn statements
Business / B2B clients — HR forms, corporate docs, vendor agreements, compliance docs, recurring support

avenuesMap.title: 5. Revenue Ladder
items: Entry level — employer notarizations, general public walk-up work, simple mobile appointments
Growth level — same-day mobile, after-hours/weekend work, hospital/hospice visits, title/auto work, repeat referrals
Scalable level — RON appointments, business accounts, law office relationships, title company relationships
Premium level — loan signings, direct title/escrow relationships, estate-planning attorney partnerships, recurring institutional contracts
